Thursday 4th March 2021

MISSION: COMPLETE FIRST PHYLOGENETIC NULL MODEL ON SOMMERS ET AL., (2020) 16S AMPLICON DATASET

I am working in Null.Rmd, following Jiao et al., (2020) Balance between community assembly processes mediates species coexistence in agricultural soil microbiomes across eastern China (https://github.com/shuojiao/Community-assembly-processes-and-species-coexistences-of-agricultural-soils-microbiome/blob/master/Null%20analysis.R) and Stegen et al., (2013) https://www.nature.com/articles/ismej201393 Quantifying community assembly processes and identifying features that impose them (https://github.com/stegen/Stegen_etal_ISME_2013) and tutorials from the BVCN (https://github.com/biovcnet/)

I am working in Neutral.Rmd, following the analysis of Burns et al., (2015) Contribution of neutral processes to the assembly of the gut microbial communities changes over host development (https://www.nature.com/articles/ismej2015142#MOESM51) and Jiao et al., (2020) Balance between community assembly processes mediates species coexistence in agricultural soil microbiomes across eastern China (https://github.com/shuojiao/Community-assembly-processes-and-species-coexistences-of-agricultural-soils-microbiome/blob/master/Neutral%20model.R)

Have downloaded the data and code for Pust et al., (2020) The human respiratory tract microbial community structures in healthy and cystic fibrosis infants (https://github.com/mmpust/airway-metagenome-infants). This has some really great code to go through and understand and apply to my analysis.

11am Went through QIIME2 questions with Carla

2pm Going to go through the BVCN "DADA2 utilizing DECIPHER for Taxonomy calling". NOTE: I'm ignoring the cutadapt section because the primers have already been removed from my sequences.

5pm Assigning taxonomy following the BVCN tutorial (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NzHc8HFEtlw&list=PL4K-daRUS2A9ACcYbgyde8PRNKFRx4arV&index=5). Will take some time but once this is done I'm going to finish and export my sequences with assigned taxonomy. 

MISSION: HAVE BASIC NULL/NEUTRAL/NETWORK CODE TO USE. HAVE DEEPER UNDERSTANDING OF QIIME2 + DADA2 + DECIPHER SOFTWARE FOR TAXONOMICALLY CLASSIFYING RAW SEQUENCE DATA.

Tomorrow: Go through both ordination scripts and make sure you understand what is happening/what the packages are doing (basically want to get to a point where I can build and use a phyloseq object properly/use a phylogenetic tree for my null model). Go through the phyloseq tutorial (https://joey711.github.io/phyloseq/import-data.html)
